candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over identical total row because non-total labels are preferred when available.
Also matches revenue, but it is a total row and duplicates Revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the primary non-total revenue line.

candidates.why: Best match for direct cost of goods/services sold on this income statement.

variables.notes: Chosen as the closest direct production/service cost line.

candidates.why: Core operating overhead component and clearly populated.
Broad overhead bucket, but appears to have more detailed components below it, so components are preferred where available.
Explicit SG&A-style overhead component.
Overhead component within other operating expenses.
Balance sheet asset row, not an income statement SG&A expense.
Balance sheet amortization contra-asset, not SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Personnel Related Liabilities and accrued expenses
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A row is present. Selected the best overhead component rows from the income statement and excluded totals/subtotals, COGS, D&A, and finance items. Did not use 'Other operating expenses' because more specific component rows exist beneath it.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Contains R&D wording, but it is amortization/supplemental disclosure rather than a dedicated current-period R&D expense line.
Balance sheet asset row, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet amortization row, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line is present on the income statement. The only R&D-related label is a supplemental amortization line, which should not be used as XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance cost line; usable fallback if direct interest expense is missing in some years.
Direct match to interest expense and best choice.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component, but narrower than total interest expense.
Finance-related but not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component, not preferred over the main reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Priority order uses direct interest expense first, then broad financial expense as fallback if needed.

candidates.row_label: Share of result of equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.
Asset line, not shareholders' equity.
Equity component only, not total parent equity.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so not preferred when parent-only equity exists.
Balancing row, not appropriate.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not appropriate.
Whole balance sheet total, not equity.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the best BE label. The row 'company' equals Total Equity minus Non-controlling interests in each shown year, so it appears to represent equity attributable to owners/parent and is the best fit for BE excluding MIB. Manual review is needed because the label is unusually truncated/ambiguous. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] company

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet minority interest stock.
Direct balance sheet NCI line and preferred label.
Same concept as NCI; good fallback if label varies by year.
Income statement profit allocation, not balance sheet MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Not a balance sheet minority interest line.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet NCI/minority-interest labels in priority order.
